rerun_strategies.action: rerun same mask with +0.04 denoise, if identity/pose are stable
rerun with lower denoise and stronger exclusion masks
increase feather/blur, add edge cleanup pass
stop and regenerate from prior approved stage with person-instance masks
run clothing surface blend pass after shape pass
run skin texture restore pass at very low denoise

promotion_rule: Only the best passing candidate may promote; failed candidates remain evidence only.
